dans un univers d'emetteurs Investment Grade

global_growth_2026_why: AI, defence and fiscal spending support world growth
global_growth_2026_raw_wording: 2026 devrait connaître une croissance équivalente à celle de 2025, autour de 3 %

us_gdp_2026_raw_wording: Après une année de chocs politiques, l’économie devrait réaccélérer vers les 2%
eurozone_gdp_2026_why: Merz plan and fiscal impulse lift the eurozone
eurozone_gdp_2026_raw_wording: la croissance devrait rebondir vers un modeste mais acceptable 1,2%
china_gdp_2026_why: Fresh stimulus is needed to keep China at 4%
china_gdp_2026_raw_wording: Pékin n’aura d’autre choix que d’élargir son déficit l’an prochain pour assurer un socle de croissance d’au moins 4%
us_inflation_2026_why: Tariffs and immigration constraints keep inflation sticky
equities_overall_why: Constructive on risk assets, with selectivity and sovereign caution.
equities_overall_raw_wording: Ce cadre demeure propice aux marchés d’actions, au crédit et, plus largement, aux actifs risqués, tout en justifiant davantage de prudence à l’égard des obligations souveraines.
equities_geography_china_why: Carmignac sees distinct AI-related opportunities in China alongside other non-US technology exposures.
equities_geography_china_raw_wording: la Chine developpe son propre ecosysteme IA, ouvrant la voie a des opportunites distinctes
equities_style_growth_why: The equity stance explicitly includes technology leaders and software beneficiaries of AI adoption.
equities_style_growth_raw_wording: Nous associons les leaders technologiques aux valeurs defensives
fixed_income_overall_why: Fixed income is used for selective carry and defense.
fixed_income_overall_raw_wording: À mesure que le cycle progresse, la sélectivité devient déterminante. Nous privilégions un portage défensif, reposant sur des émetteurs solides.
fixed_income_credit_quality_investment_g: positive
Prefers solid issuers with an investment-grade profile.

La forte dispersion entre émetteurs, notations et secteurs permet de bâtir des portefeuilles générant un rendement moyen de 5% avec un profil investment grade assurant un équilibre efficace entre risque et rémunération attendue.
fixed_income_duration_why: Long sovereign duration is explicitly avoided.
fixed_income_duration_raw_wording: Les obligations à 30 ans émises par des pays aux finances publiques dégradées n’offrent pas une rémunération suffisante. Nous préférons les éviter, voire adopter des positions vendeuses sur ces dernières.
fixed_income_segment_government_bonds_wh: Nominal long-dated sovereign bonds are unattractive.
fixed_income_segment_government_bonds_ra: Les obligations à 30 ans émises par des pays aux finances publiques dégradées n’offrent pas une rémunération suffisante. Nous préférons les éviter, voire adopter des positions vendeuses sur ces dernières.
fixed_income_segment_corporate_bonds_why: Carmignac prefers public credit from solid issuers and highlights investment-grade defense corporates as an attractive way to gain exposure.
fixed_income_segment_corporate_bonds_raw: les marches de credit publics sont par construction plus conservateurs
fixed_income_segment_inflation_linked_wh: Inflation linkers are preferred for carry and protection.
fixed_income_segment_inflation_linked_ra: Ce contexte est favorable aux obligations indexées à l’inflation. Elles combinent ainsi portage, protection et convexité.
currencies_jpy_why: Yen is treated as a key hedge.
currencies_jpy_raw_wording: Les couvertures les plus pertinentes se trouvent aujourd’hui dans les CDS, le yen japonais et l’or.
currencies_em_fx_why: Commodity- and reform-supported FX are preferred.
currencies_em_fx_raw_wording: Le peso chilien, le rand sud-africain et le dollar australien se distinguent par l’amélioration des termes de l’échange, la discipline budgétaire ou l’exposition aux matières premières.
commodities_gold_raw_wording: Les couvertures les plus pertinentes se trouvent aujourd’hui dans les CDS, le yen japonais et l’or.
themes_ai_why: Structural AI upside remains, but crowding and bubble risk are acknowledged.
themes_ai_raw_wording: L’IA et la technologie restent une tendance haussière alimentée par des forces structurelles, mais la principale inquiétude porte sur l’ampleur de l’engouement autour de ce thème très populaire.
themes_healthcare_why: Healthcare is one half of the equity barbell.
themes_healthcare_raw_wording: Nous associons les leaders technologiques aux valeurs défensives des secteurs de la santé et de la consommation de base.
themes_energy_transition_why: Electrification is an explicit industrial theme.
themes_energy_transition_raw_wording: La fin de la Pax Americana remet la souveraineté nationale au centre des priorités industrielles, entraînant des investissements majeurs dans la défense, les infrastructures et l’électrification.
themes_geopolitical_risk_why: Persistent tariffs and geopolitical tensions are explicit headwinds in Carmignac's 2026 framework.
themes_geopolitical_risk_raw_wording: persistance des tensions geopolitiques (tarifs, Russie, Taiwan, Venezuela)
themes_defense_sovereignty_why: Defense and sovereignty are central themes.
themes_defense_sovereignty_raw_wording: La fin de la Pax Americana remet la souveraineté nationale au centre des priorités industrielles, entraînant des investissements majeurs dans la défense, les infrastructures et l’électrification.
themes_other_why: Staples / defensive consumption is part of the barbell theme set.
themes_other_raw_wording: Nous associons les leaders technologiques aux valeurs défensives des secteurs de la santé et de la consommation de base.

global_growth_2026_why: LGT expects reflationary policies and nominal growth, but in a much more volatile regime.
global_growth_2026_raw_wording: Reflationary policies for higher nominal growth
global_inflation_2026_why: Elevated inflation risks are one of the defining portfolio challenges in 2026.
fed_year_end_rate_2026_why: LGT warns that fiscal dominance could force policy rates too low relative to inflation.
fed_year_end_rate_2026_raw_wording: we could end up with policy rates that are too low and inflation that runs too high
equities_overall_why: LGT is increasing public equities outside the US within its strategic allocation.
equities_overall_raw_wording: a shift from high-yield bonds to public equities outside the US

equities_geography_us_raw_wording: a shift from high-yield bonds to public equities outside the US
equities_geography_europe_why: Europe is part of the preferred rebalancing away from concentrated US assets.
equities_geography_europe_raw_wording: Focus on ... opportunities in Europe and Asia
equities_geography_em_why: LGT wants more EM equities and bonds in the strategic allocation.
equities_geography_em_raw_wording: Add to holdings of emerging markets equities and bonds
equities_geography_china_why: China is highlighted as a market where AI adoption may already be ahead of the US.
equities_geography_china_raw_wording: China, for instance, is pushing hard for fast adoption
equities_size_small_cap_why: LGT explicitly favors small- and mid-sized private equity opportunities.
equities_size_small_cap_raw_wording: Focus on small- and mid-sized private equity
equities_style_quality_why: LGT says its public-market mandates maintain a strong focus on sustainability and quality.
equities_style_quality_raw_wording: we maintain a strong focus on sustainability and quality

fixed_income_overall_raw_wording: shift from high-yield bonds to ... inflation-linked bonds

Investment-grade bonds 9.0% ... High-yield bonds 1.0%
fixed_income_segment_em_debt_why: LGT wants more EM debt, especially local-currency exposure.
fixed_income_segment_em_debt_raw_wording: Shift from hard currency to local currency in EM debt
fixed_income_segment_inflation_linked_wh: Inflation-linked bonds are a named portfolio measure.
fixed_income_segment_inflation_linked_ra: Add to holdings of inflation-linked bonds
currencies_usd_why: LGT hedges most USD exposure back to base currency.
currencies_usd_raw_wording: Hedge most US dollar exposure back to base currency
currencies_em_fx_why: LGT leaves EM and frontier FX unhedged to harvest carry.
currencies_em_fx_raw_wording: Leave emerging and frontier market FX unhedged to capitalize on the positive interest rate carry
commodities_gold_why: Gold is one of the explicit resilience tools in the LGT allocation playbook.
themes_ai_why: LGT remains constructive on AI buildout, but explicitly warns about over-investment and labor disruption.
themes_ai_raw_wording: baseline view is that the buildout push is continuing for now, but ... two ways that this could go wrong
themes_geopolitical_risk_why: Geopolitical crises and unstable multipolarity are central risks.
themes_geopolitical_risk_raw_wording: geopolitical crises and supply shocks
themes_defense_sovereignty_why: National security, industrial policy, and sovereignty concerns are explicit drivers in the outlook.
themes_defense_sovereignty_raw_wording: Alignment with the government's evolving policy priorities has now become a critical success factor

us_gdp_2026_why: Lazard expects US growth to downshift materially because of trade and immigration policy.
us_gdp_2026_raw_wording: US trade policies and much stricter enforcement of immigration policies have led to a downshift in sustainable GDP growth from 1.7%-2.0% previously to perhaps 1.2%-1.5% looking forward.
eurozone_gdp_2026_why: German fiscal stimulus is expected to lift eurozone growth above consensus in 2026.
eurozone_gdp_2026_raw_wording: I expect this fiscal stimulus to meaningfully lift German GDP growth and to boost Eurozone GDP growth as well.
us_inflation_2026_why: Lazard expects tariffs to push US inflation above 3.5% in early 2026 rather than settle at target.
us_inflation_2026_raw_wording: US Consumer Price Index inflation rate is likely to top 3.5% in the first half of 2026.
eurozone_inflation_2026_why: Eurozone inflation is expected to fall below the ECB's 2% target.
eurozone_inflation_2026_raw_wording: Moreover, I expect inflation to fall below the European Central Bank's (ECB) 2% target.
equities_geography_us_why: Lazard expects the US to lose some of its exceptionalism.
equities_geography_us_raw_wording: A weaker dollar, stretched equity valuations, and earnings concentrated in a narrow set of AI-linked tech firms add to the risk of US equity underperformance. Non-US equities appear better positioned for sustained outperformance.
equities_geography_europe_why: Europe benefits from easing, lower energy costs, and fiscal support.
equities_geography_europe_raw_wording: We expect a brighter outlook for the Eurozone economy in 2026. Low interest rates and energy prices, rising real wages, and continued fiscal expansion should support growth.
equities_geography_japan_why: Lazard explicitly says Japanese equities look attractive despite only modest GDP growth.
equities_geography_japan_raw_wording: Japanese equities also look attractive, with policy support for consumption and corporate returns, even if GDP growth remains modest.
equities_geography_em_why: Lazard sees stronger value and broader opportunity in EM than in crowded US markets.
equities_geography_em_raw_wording: Emerging markets are particularly appealing, and they can offer AI exposure at far lower valuations. In many cases, local currency EM debt also stands out for appreciation potential.
fixed_income_credit_quality_investment_g: ND
fixed_income_segment_government_bonds_wh: DM sovereign bonds are capped by debt-sustainability concerns.
fixed_income_segment_government_bonds_ra: Outside the United States, debt sustainability concerns limit the appeal of many other developed market bonds.
fixed_income_segment_em_debt_why: EM local debt is singled out as a more attractive fixed-income segment.
fixed_income_segment_em_debt_raw_wording: In many cases, local currency EM debt stands out for appreciation potential.
currencies_usd_why: Dollar weakness is part of the non-US outperformance thesis.
currencies_usd_raw_wording: A weaker dollar is likely, and with global investors increasingly seeking to hedge their US dollar exposure on any US currency rally, there are also potential gains on FX in addition to share prices.
currencies_em_fx_why: Local-currency EM debt is attractive partly because of FX appreciation potential.
currencies_em_fx_raw_wording: local currency EM debt stands out for appreciation potential ... FX appreciation potential.
commodities_gold_why: Gold is the explicit hedge against Fed-credibility risk and dollar stress.
commodities_gold_raw_wording: Meaningful market concerns are hard to find with the exception of gold, which has rallied sharply. I believe uncertainty surrounding Fed independence was a meaningful contributor, with the effects likely to be most visible via the US dollar and gold in the near term.
themes_ai_why: AI is structurally important, but Lazard questions the near-term capital cycle and payoff.
themes_ai_raw_wording: I am skeptical that this AI boom will be sustained through 2026. Make no mistake: AI will be revolutionary for the global economy, but the rules of economics and finance still apply.
themes_geopolitical_risk_why: Geopolitical intervention is an explicit risk across Lazard's EM and Japan discussion.
themes_geopolitical_risk_raw_wording: Risks from geopolitical intervention remain, but similar risks are rising in the United States.
themes_defense_sovereignty_why: European defense spending is treated as a real growth and investment theme.
themes_defense_sovereignty_raw_wording: Defense-Driven Growth: if higher spending is sustained and the funds are used largely for military research, development, and production of military equipment in Europe, the multiplier effects could surprise on the upside.

global_growth_2026_why: Lombard Odier expects world growth to stay moderate in 2026 rather than giving a clean point estimate in the text.
global_growth_2026_raw_wording: Nous tablons sur une croissance mondiale a nouveau moderee en 2026.
us_gdp_2026_why: The US is expected to grow below trend and below potential in 2026, but the narrative is directional rather than a precise point forecast.
us_gdp_2026_raw_wording: Nous anticipons un nouvel affaiblissement du marche de l'emploi et une croissance inferieure a son potentiel.
eurozone_gdp_2026_why: Eurozone growth should be modest and slightly above 1%, supported by Germany and EU spending.
eurozone_gdp_2026_raw_wording: Nous tablons sur une croissance moderee depassant legerement 1% dans la zone euro.
china_gdp_2026_why: China should slow only gradually to a little above 4% in 2026; the source wording is approximate rather than a strict table forecast.
china_gdp_2026_raw_wording: la croissance chinoise ... devrait passer a un peu plus de 4% en 2026.
us_inflation_2026_why: US inflation is expected to remain above target in 2026, peaking just above 3% early in the year.
us_inflation_2026_raw_wording: nous pensons que l'indice des depenses de consommation personnelle terminera l'annee 2026 au-dessus de l'objectif, apres avoir atteint un pic d'un peu plus de 3% en debut d'annee
eurozone_inflation_2026_why: Eurozone inflation should stay broadly aligned with the ECB target through 2026.
eurozone_inflation_2026_raw_wording: avec des taux d'interet inchanges et une inflation globalement alignee sur l'objectif tout au long de l'annee
fed_year_end_rate_2026_why: Labour-market weakening eventually allows Fed easing
fed_year_end_rate_2026_raw_wording: nous tablons sur des taux directeurs d'environ 3% fin 2026.
ecb_deposit_rate_year_end_2026_why: ECB keeps rates steady as inflation stays contained
ecb_deposit_rate_year_end_2026_raw_wordi: Nous pensons que l'inflation sera maitrisee et que les taux directeurs seront maintenus a 2% cette annee.
snb_policy_rate_year_end_2026_why: SNB keeps rates at zero absent a sharper slowdown
snb_policy_rate_year_end_2026_raw_wordin: les taux d'interet devraient etre maintenus a 0% en 2026 sauf en cas de ralentissement marque de la croissance ou de l'inflation.
eur_usd_2026_why: Fed easing and a softer dollar lift EUR/USD
eur_usd_2026_raw_wording: Nous tablons sur une appreciation de l'euro aux alentours de 1,22 contre dollar.
equities_overall_why: Constructive but diversified equity stance.
equities_overall_raw_wording: Nous abordons l’année 2026 avec un positionnement de portefeuille discipliné, ancré dans les perspectives stratégiques et affichant une diversification robuste entre régions et classes d’actifs.
equities_geography_europe_why: Lombard Odier sees Europe benefiting from fiscal easing, better earnings support, and defense and infrastructure spending.
equities_geography_europe_raw_wording: En Europe, les valorisations sont superieures aux moyennes historiques, mais la croissance des benefices devrait profiter de l'assouplissement budgetaire
equities_geography_em_why: Emerging markets are a named equity beneficiary of broader market participation.
equities_geography_em_raw_wording: Sur les marchés actions, nous anticipons un élargissement des performances, les prévisions de croissance bénéficiaire au niveau mondial augurant de gains significatifs, notamment sur les marchés émergents.
equities_geography_china_why: Chinese technology is treated as an attractive equity opportunity because earnings growth is strong, valuations are better, and AI adoption is faster.
equities_geography_china_raw_wording: le secteur technologique chinois offre une croissance des benefices similaire, de meilleures valorisations, une adoption plus rapide de l'IA
equities_style_quality_why: The preferred equity style is quality growth at a reasonable price, alongside dividend payers.
equities_style_quality_raw_wording: nous privilegions les actions conjuguant croissance de qualite et prix raisonnable
fixed_income_overall_why: Fixed income preference is led by value in EM debt.
fixed_income_overall_raw_wording: Sur les marchés obligataires, la dette émergente offre la meilleure valeur.
fixed_income_credit_quality_investment_g: mixed
Corporate bond spreads are tight and likely to limit upside, so Lombard Odier is selective rather than broadly constructive on developed-market credit.
L'ecart de rendement des obligations d'entreprise s'est encore resserre en 2025.
fixed_income_credit_quality_high_yield_w: Tight spreads make high-yield corporate bonds less attractive in 2026.
fixed_income_credit_quality_high_yield_r: les obligations d'entreprise de qualite et a haut rendement ne sont pas pour autant attractives
fixed_income_segment_government_bonds_wh: Developed-market sovereign bonds should underperform emerging debt and offer limited capital gains.
fixed_income_segment_government_bonds_ra: Les obligations souveraines des marches developpes devraient sous-performer leurs consoeurs emergentes.
fixed_income_segment_em_debt_why: EM debt is explicitly called the best value segment.
fixed_income_segment_em_debt_raw_wording: Sur les marchés obligataires, la dette émergente offre la meilleure valeur.
currencies_usd_why: Weakening USD is part of the supportive asset backdrop.
currencies_usd_raw_wording: La baisse des taux d’intérêt américains, l’affaiblissement du billet vert, ainsi que la trêve commerciale entre les Etats-Unis et la Chine sont autant de vents porteurs.
currencies_eur_why: Lombard Odier expects euro appreciation versus the dollar toward 1.22.
currencies_eur_raw_wording: Nous tablons sur une appreciation de l'euro aux alentours de 1,22 contre dollar.
commodities_gold_why: Gold is expected to rise further and diversify portfolios.
commodities_gold_raw_wording: Nous tablons sur une nouvelle progression de l’or ; notre allocation dédiée devrait continuer à apporter de la diversification.
commodities_industrial_metals_why: Materials and AI-linked commodity exposure benefit from infrastructure and capex.
commodities_industrial_metals_raw_wordin: Les actions liées aux matières premières, en particulier celles du secteur des matériaux, offrent à présent une meilleure valeur et devraient bénéficier des investissements infrastructurels et de l’élargissement des dépenses liées à l’IA en 2026.
themes_ai_why: AI remains important, but the firm stresses selectivity and valuation discipline.
themes_ai_raw_wording: Parallèlement, l’IA transforme les flux de capitaux. Les investisseurs font déjà preuve d’un plus grand discernement quant à l’ampleur des dépenses, et la concentration du marché ne laisse que peu de place à la complaisance.
themes_healthcare_why: Healthcare is treated as a strategic, investable resilience theme.
themes_healthcare_raw_wording: La santé devient un pilier stratégique de l’investissement durable. Les infrastructures de santé, les outils de diagnostic et les plateformes de santé digitale permettent une exposition évolutive tant à l’impact qu’à la croissance.
themes_energy_transition_why: Electrification and decarbonization are explicit structural themes.
themes_energy_transition_raw_wording: L’essor des infrastructures d’IA accélère l’électrification, un thème d’investissement clé dans le cadre de la transition vers la durabilité.
themes_geopolitical_risk_why: Geopolitical tensions are explicitly treated as downside risks that can hit energy markets and supply chains.
themes_geopolitical_risk_raw_wording: les tensions geopolitiques qui pourraient se repercuter sur les marches de l'energie et perturber les chaines d'approvisionnement
themes_defense_sovereignty_why: Defense and technological sovereignty are framed as key strategic drivers.
themes_defense_sovereignty_raw_wording: En Europe, la capacité de l’Allemagne à mettre en œuvre ses projets d’investissement dans les infrastructures, la technologie et la défense sera déterminante. La Chine entend profiter de sa trêve commerciale avec les Etats-Unis pour renforcer son indépendance technologique.
themes_other_why: Water and climate adaptation form an additional thematic opportunity.
themes_other_raw_wording: L’eau devient un enjeu géopolitique et économique majeur, et les entreprises proposant des technologies d’analyse et de purification évolutives à bas coût sont susceptibles d’attirer des capitaux liés à l’action climatique.

global_growth_2026_why: Mirabaud frames 2026 as a transition environment with lower inflation, easier policy, and selective growth opportunities.
global_growth_2026_raw_wording: we are investing through a transition
us_gdp_2026_why: Mirabaud expects US GDP growth to hold slightly below 2%.
us_gdp_2026_raw_wording: we expect US GDP growth to hold steady at slightly below 2%
eurozone_gdp_2026_why: Europe's recovery is driven by fiscal expansion and eurozone growth around 1.2%.
eurozone_gdp_2026_raw_wording: Public investment across the eurozone ... with growth reaching 1.2%
china_gdp_2026_why: Chinese growth could surprise to the upside and exceed 4.7% with public investment.
fed_year_end_rate_2026_why: Mirabaud expects only moderate Fed easing with a terminal rate near 3%.
fed_year_end_rate_2026_raw_wording: monetary easing is expected to remain moderate, with a terminal rate close to 3%
ecb_deposit_rate_year_end_2026_why: The ECB is expected to maintain its current stance.
ecb_deposit_rate_year_end_2026_raw_wordi: we expect the European Central Bank to maintain its current monetary policy stance
equities_geography_europe_why: Mirabaud is explicitly constructive on European equities, especially SMIDs.
equities_geography_europe_raw_wording: we think Europe remains one of the most under-valued and under-owned regions
equities_size_small_cap_why: Small- and mid-caps are one of Mirabaud's clearest convictions for 2026.
equities_size_small_cap_raw_wording: small- and mid-cap companies ... remain one of the clearest ways to access genuine growth
equities_style_quality_why: The house view stresses pricing power, innovation capacity, and strong balance sheets.
equities_style_quality_raw_wording: companies with pricing power, innovation capacity and strong balance sheets
fixed_income_overall_why: Mirabaud expects income and selectivity to do the heavy lifting in fixed income.
fixed_income_overall_raw_wording: In fixed income, we expect income to do more of the heavy lifting in 2026.
fixed_income_credit_quality_investment_g: positive
They keep a quality bias late in the cycle.
keeping the quality bias that has served us well late in the cycle
fixed_income_credit_quality_high_yield_w: Mirabaud still finds carry attractive in high yield, but keeps a strong quality bias and remains underweight lower-quality credit.
fixed_income_credit_quality_high_yield_r: high yield becomes a steady income story rather than a directional one ... we maintain a clear tilt towards higher-quality credit ... remain underweight lower-quality credit
themes_ai_why: AI and capex are central macro and market drivers in the outlook.
themes_ai_raw_wording: the AI and capex cycle is reshaping winners and losers
themes_defense_sovereignty_why: European military and infrastructure spending is part of Mirabaud's recovery thesis.
themes_defense_sovereignty_raw_wording: Germany is forecasting a record deficit of 4.75% of GDP, mainly due to higher military and infrastructure spending.

us_gdp_2026_why: Tax cuts and easier policy keep U.S. growth near 2%
us_gdp_2026_raw_wording: GDP growth is projected to be around 2%.
eurozone_gdp_2026_why: Europe continues a modest recovery on lower rates and German stimulus
eurozone_gdp_2026_raw_wording: The modest recovery is expected to continue in 2026 based on lower household savings and an acceleration in the German economy thanks to Merz's stimulus plan.
eurozone_inflation_2026_why: Oddo sees eurozone inflation just under target
eurozone_inflation_2026_raw_wording: inflation is expected to remain just below the 2% target.
ecb_deposit_rate_year_end_2026_why: Oddo expects the ECB to stay on hold
ecb_deposit_rate_year_end_2026_raw_wordi: The ECB completed its cycle of rate cuts in June 2025 and is not expected to lower its key rates further in this context.
equities_overall_why: Oddo remains broadly constructive on risk assets in its central scenario.
equities_overall_raw_wording: The global economy was shaken up, but there was no apparent breakage. Global growth remained slightly above 3%.
equities_geography_us_why: The U.S. remains resilient because AI spending offsets softer labor conditions.
equities_geography_us_raw_wording: Neither the tariff war, nor trade tensions, nor the legal and political noise brought the economy to its knees. The labor market weakened significantly, but AI spending continued to boom.
equities_geography_europe_why: Europe is improving, but the view remains cautious because the recovery is still modest.
equities_geography_europe_raw_wording: The modest recovery is expected to continue in 2026, based on a decline in household savings rates and an acceleration in the German economy thanks to Merz’s stimulus plan.
equities_geography_china_why: China remains strategically ambitious but macro-fragile.
equities_geography_china_raw_wording: The Chinese economy remains paradoxical. At the macro level, internal weaknesses are becoming more pronounced, yet in 2026 China is set to unveil a new five-year plan consolidating its ambitions for leadership.
fixed_income_credit_quality_investment_g: ND
themes_ai_why: Oddo explicitly treats AI exuberance as a market weak point.
themes_ai_raw_wording: The financial sphere still faces the risk of an AI bubble bursting.
themes_geopolitical_risk_why: Geopolitical pressure is a direct downside factor for Europe and markets.
themes_geopolitical_risk_raw_wording: Multiple geopolitical tensions could weigh on market sentiment. Europe faces triple pressure—from the United States, Russia, and China.
themes_defense_sovereignty_why: Infrastructure and defense are among the few explicit positive structural themes in the note.
themes_defense_sovereignty_raw_wording: After a year of announcements and preparations, the infrastructure and defense investment plan should take shape.

global_growth_2026_why: Pictet expects the policy backdrop to support global growth in 2026, but the text gives a directional view rather than a clean point forecast.
global_growth_2026_raw_wording: Le contexte favorable devrait soutenir la croissance mondiale en 2026
us_gdp_2026_why: US growth should accelerate early in the year on budget support and trade stabilization, but no explicit numeric forecast is given in the text.
us_gdp_2026_raw_wording: Aux Etats-Unis, la croissance devrait s'accelerer en debut d'annee
eurozone_gdp_2026_why: Europe's recovery is tied to German fiscal expansion and broader integration, but not disclosed as a precise 2026 GDP number in the narrative.
eurozone_gdp_2026_raw_wording: En Europe, la reprise s'appuiera sur le vaste programme budgetaire de l'Allemagne.
china_gdp_2026_why: China should improve later as trade uncertainty fades and stimulus is deployed, but the text does not provide a clean point estimate.
china_gdp_2026_raw_wording: Une acceleration plus tardive est attendue en Chine.
us_inflation_2026_why: Pictet expects US inflation to tick back up in 2026 without giving a precise printed level.
us_inflation_2026_raw_wording: L'inflation devrait remonter d'un cran aux Etats-Unis
eurozone_inflation_2026_why: Eurozone inflation is expected to slow in 2026, but the source remains directional.
eurozone_inflation_2026_raw_wording: ralentir au sein de la zone euro
fed_year_end_rate_2026_why: Pictet expects the Fed to keep cutting through 2026 under a more growth-supportive leadership stance.
fed_year_end_rate_2026_raw_wording: La Fed devrait poursuivre ses baisses de taux en 2026
equities_overall_why: Pictet keeps a constructive cross-market baseline for 2026.
equities_overall_raw_wording: Le contexte favorable devrait soutenir la croissance mondiale en 2026 et réduire les écarts creusés par l’économie en K.
equities_geography_us_why: The US is still supported early in 2026 by fiscal follow-through.
equities_geography_us_raw_wording: Aux Etats-Unis, la croissance devrait s’accélérer en début d’année dans le sillage de la fin de la paralysie budgétaire et des promesses de soutien.
equities_geography_europe_why: Europe is supported by German stimulus and single-market deepening.
equities_geography_europe_raw_wording: En Europe, la reprise s’appuiera sur le vaste programme budgétaire de l’Allemagne et sur l’intégration économique qui doit renforcer la compétitivité dans l’énergie, la finance et les communications.
equities_geography_em_why: Pictet explicitly links its China margin-recovery thesis to a broader positive stance on emerging markets.
equities_geography_em_raw_wording: d'ou notre optimisme a l'egard des marches emergents
equities_geography_china_why: China is expected to improve later in the year with policy support.
equities_geography_china_raw_wording: Une accélération plus tardive est attendue en Chine. Le pays devrait tirer profit de l’atténuation des incertitudes commerciales et de la politique anti-involution menée par Pékin.
fixed_income_credit_quality_investment_g: ND
themes_defense_sovereignty_why: Defense and strategic autonomy are explicit European growth themes.
themes_defense_sovereignty_raw_wording: Les technologies spatiales et militaires recèlent un potentiel de croissance important pour l’Europe, d’autant que les investissements allemands se concentrent sur les infrastructures et la défense.
themes_other_why: European integration is treated as a structural theme in its own right.
themes_other_raw_wording: L’Union européenne poursuit le processus d’intégration économique et a fixé à 2028 le délai d’achèvement du marché unique, afin de renforcer la compétitivité dans l’énergie, la finance et les communications.

global_growth_2026_why: AI capex and fiscal support keep global growth resilient
us_gdp_2026_why: AI investment cushions a moderate US slowdown
eurozone_gdp_2026_why: European growth stays modest despite fiscal support
em_growth_2026_why: Emerging markets stay resilient as the dollar weakens
us_inflation_2026_why: US inflation remains above target longer
eurozone_inflation_2026_why: Eurozone inflation moves back toward target
fed_year_end_rate_2026_why: Amundi sees gradual Fed easing into late 2026
ecb_deposit_rate_year_end_2026_why: ECB stays accommodative with sub-potential growth
eur_usd_2026_why: Structural dollar weakness continues into late 2026
equities_overall_why: Constructive equity stance, but diversified beyond concentrated winners.
equities_overall_raw_wording: La diversification reste la meilleure défense dans un monde où les marchés actions sont concentrés et les valorisations élevées. Il convient de rééquilibrer les portefeuilles entre les styles, les secteurs, les tailles et les régions.
equities_geography_us_why: Amundi keeps an equal-weight US stance: Fed cuts are supportive, but concentration and valuation risks limit upside.
equities_geography_us_raw_wording: Globalement neutre, renforcement de cette equiponderation pour aller au-dela du risque de concentration
equities_geography_europe_why: European assets are explicitly highlighted in the diversification push.
equities_geography_europe_raw_wording: Il convient de rééquilibrer les portefeuilles afin de saisir les opportunités, notamment sur les marchés émergents et les actifs européens.
equities_geography_japan_why: Japan remains supported medium term, but Amundi shifts to neutral in H1 2026 before potentially adding later in the year.
equities_geography_japan_raw_wording: Passage a neutre au S1, avant de renforcer au S2 lors des politiques pro-croissance
equities_geography_em_why: Emerging markets are highlighted as part of the preferred diversification set.
equities_geography_em_raw_wording: Il convient de rééquilibrer les portefeuilles afin de saisir les opportunités, notamment sur les marchés émergents et les actifs européens.
equities_size_small_cap_why: European SMID exposure is explicitly favored.
equities_size_small_cap_raw_wording: La dynamique européenne se maintient. Cela peut créer des opportunités dans le crédit d’entreprise en euro, les petites et moyennes capitalisations et les thèmes liés à la défense, aux infrastructures et à l’autonomie stratégique.
fixed_income_overall_why: Amundi stays constructive on fixed income through euro credit and emerging debt, while remaining selective on duration and spread risk.
fixed_income_overall_raw_wording: La dette emergente en devise forte reste attractive
fixed_income_credit_quality_investment_g: positive
Investment grade is preferred over more volatile US Treasuries.
Dans ce nouveau paradigme, nous privilégions les obligations européennes et, aux États-Unis, le crédit investment grade par rapport aux bons du Trésor américain plus volatils.
fixed_income_credit_quality_high_yield_w: Amundi is selective on high yield: US and European HY look vulnerable, but selective higher-carry EM exposure still has value.
fixed_income_credit_quality_high_yield_r: La categorie est plus vulnerable aux signes de faiblesse des entreprises
fixed_income_segment_corporate_bonds_why: Euro corporate credit is an explicit opportunity.
fixed_income_segment_corporate_bonds_raw: La dynamique européenne se maintient. Cela peut créer des opportunités dans le crédit d’entreprise en euro.
fixed_income_segment_em_debt_why: EM bonds are favored for income and diversification.
fixed_income_segment_em_debt_raw_wording: Les obligations émergentes se distinguent pour leur revenu élevé et leur potentiel de diversification, tandis que les actions émergentes offrent un éventail diversifié d’opportunités.
currencies_usd_why: Weak USD is an explicit FX position.
currencies_usd_raw_wording: Nous continuons de nous positionner pour un dollar faible, bien que non linéaire, en 2026.
currencies_eur_why: Amundi's EUR/USD forecast and weak-dollar stance imply euro appreciation versus the dollar into late 2026.
currencies_em_fx_why: Long EM FX as the dollar weakens.
currencies_em_fx_raw_wording: Les devises émergentes pourraient s’apprécier dans un contexte de dépréciation du dollar américain. Nous privilégions les devises à portage élevé en Amérique latine, dans la région CEEMEA et en Asie.
commodities_gold_why: Gold is part of the recommended diversification toolkit.
commodities_gold_raw_wording: Cela nécessite une prise de risque sélective et une diversification accrue dans les devises, l’or et les actifs réels.
themes_ai_why: AI remains a major structural growth and capex theme.
themes_ai_raw_wording: Les thèmes de l’IA et de la transformation technologique stimulent la demande énergétique dans un contexte de transition vers la neutralité carbone.
themes_energy_transition_why: Energy transition and climate infrastructure are explicit opportunities.
themes_energy_transition_raw_wording: Les thèmes de l’IA et de la transformation technologique stimulent la demande énergétique dans un contexte de transition vers la neutralité carbone. Cela ouvre des opportunités parmi les actions liées au thème climatique, les infrastructures durables et les obligations vertes.
themes_geopolitical_risk_why: Multipolar disorder is treated as a structural backdrop and source of opportunity.
themes_geopolitical_risk_raw_wording: Nous sommes confrontés à une ère de désordre contrôlé : un monde multipolaire remodelé par une révolution technologique et des divergences budgétaires.
themes_defense_sovereignty_why: Defense and strategic autonomy are named investment themes.
themes_defense_sovereignty_raw_wording: La dynamique européenne se maintient. Cela peut créer des opportunités dans les thèmes liés à la défense, aux infrastructures et à l’autonomie stratégique.

us_gdp_2026_why: BlackRock expects AI spending to keep U.S. growth resilient in 2026 even as the labor market cools.
us_gdp_2026_raw_wording: We see AI capital spending still supporting growth in 2026, allowing growth to hold up even as the labor market keeps cooling.
us_inflation_2026_why: BlackRock expects U.S. inflation to remain sticky above target.
us_inflation_2026_raw_wording: Yet inflation could prove sticky above the Fed's 2% target.
equities_geography_us_why: BlackRock remains explicitly overweight U.S. equities.
equities_geography_us_raw_wording: United States: We are overweight. Strong corporate earnings, driven in part by the AI theme, are supported by a favorable macro backdrop and continued Federal Reserve easing.
equities_geography_europe_why: Europe is investable, but not a broad overweight.
equities_geography_europe_raw_wording: Europe: We stay selective, favoring financials, utilities and healthcare. We are neutral.
equities_geography_japan_why: Japan is one of BlackRock’s clearest preferred international equity markets.
equities_geography_japan_raw_wording: Japanese stocks are one of our preferred tactical and strategic exposures. We are overweight.
equities_geography_em_why: EM is explicitly preferred over developed markets.
equities_geography_em_raw_wording: Within equities, we favor EM over DM yet get selective in both. We see opportunities across EM linked to AI and the energy transition.
equities_geography_china_why: China is not a full positive call, but BlackRock still supports China tech within a neutral country stance.
equities_geography_china_raw_wording: China: We are neutral. Trade relations with the U.S. have steadied, but property stress and an aging population still constrain the macro outlook. We still favor China tech within our neutral view.
fixed_income_credit_quality_investment_g: neutral
BlackRock sees investment-grade carry as acceptable but not compelling enough for an overweight, especially at longer maturities.
Short-term IG credit: We are neutral... Long-term IG credit: We are underweight.
fixed_income_credit_quality_high_yield_w: BlackRock sees high yield carry as attractive, but expects greater issuer dispersion and stays neutral overall.
fixed_income_credit_quality_high_yield_r: Global high yield: We are neutral. High yield offers more attractive carry ... but we think dispersion between higher and weaker issuers will increase.
fixed_income_duration_why: BlackRock remains cautious on long-duration U.S. sovereign exposure.
fixed_income_segment_government_bonds_wh: BlackRock is broadly cautious on long-duration developed-market government bonds, especially long U.S. Treasuries and Japanese government bonds.
fixed_income_segment_government_bonds_ra: Long U.S. Treasuries: We are underweight ... Japanese govt bonds: We are underweight.
fixed_income_segment_em_debt_why: EM hard-currency debt is explicitly overweighted.
fixed_income_segment_em_debt_raw_wording: EM hard currency: We are overweight. A weaker U.S. dollar, lower U.S. rates and effective EM fiscal and monetary policy have improved economic resilience. We prefer high yield bonds.
currencies_usd_why: The base case still embeds a softer dollar backdrop.
currencies_usd_raw_wording: A weaker U.S. dollar has boosted local currency EM debt, though it is unclear if this weakening will persist.
currencies_em_fx_why: BlackRock acknowledges EM local-currency support from a weaker dollar but does not take a full positive stance because that dollar weakness may not persist.
currencies_em_fx_raw_wording: EM local currency: We are neutral. A weaker U.S. dollar has boosted local currency EM debt, but it's unclear if this weakening will persist.
commodities_gold_why: Gold is still a positive tactical allocation even if not a strategic anchor.
commodities_gold_raw_wording: We like gold as a tactical play with idiosyncratic drivers but do not see it as a long-term portfolio hedge.
themes_ai_why: AI is still BlackRock’s dominant equity theme.
themes_ai_raw_wording: We remain pro-risk and see the AI theme still the main driver of U.S. equities. We stay risk-on and overweight U.S. stocks on the AI theme.
themes_energy_transition_why: BlackRock explicitly ties AI deployment to energy and infrastructure demand.
themes_energy_transition_raw_wording: The next phase of the AI buildout may be more about energy and resolving bottlenecks. We see opportunities across EM linked to AI and the energy transition.
themes_defense_sovereignty_why: Defense and fragmentation are treated as investable structural forces.
themes_defense_sovereignty_raw_wording: Fragmentation: AI and defense. We see India as a potential beneficiary of heightened geopolitical fragmentation that benefits multi-aligned connector countries.

eurozone_inflation_2026_why: Eurozone inflation stays aligned with target
eurozone_inflation_2026_raw_wording: Nous pensons que la BCE va maintenir son taux directeur a 2 % en raison d'une inflation conforme a l'objectif et de l'expansion budgetaire allemande.
fed_year_end_rate_2026_why: Goldman's soft-landing scenario implies further Fed easing
fed_year_end_rate_2026_raw_wording: Atterrissage en douceur ... -75 pb, a 3-3,25 %
ecb_deposit_rate_year_end_2026_why: Goldman expects the ECB to hold at 2%
ecb_deposit_rate_year_end_2026_raw_wordi: Nous pensons que la BCE va maintenir son taux directeur a 2 % en raison d'une inflation conforme a l'objectif et de l'expansion budgetaire allemande.
equities_overall_why: Constructive on equities, but through active global diversification rather than passive beta.
equities_overall_raw_wording: Compte tenu du contexte actuel, il nous semble essentiel de diversifier au maximum l’exposition aux actions, d’adopter une exposition active, d’investir à l’échelle mondiale et de gérer efficacement les risques.
equities_geography_europe_why: European equities benefit from capex in defense and infrastructure.
equities_geography_europe_raw_wording: En Europe, la priorité accordée à la sécurité nationale et économique se traduit par une augmentation des investissements dans les infrastructures et les capacités de défense.
equities_size_small_cap_why: Small and mid caps linked to AI infrastructure are explicitly attractive.
equities_size_small_cap_raw_wording: Sur les segments des petites et moyennes capitalisations, nous pensons que les facilitateurs, fournissant les pioches et les pelles du boom de l’IA, offrent d’excellentes opportunités.
fixed_income_overall_why: Easing cycles support a constructive fixed-income stance.
fixed_income_overall_raw_wording: Les cycles d’assouplissement offrent selon nous des opportunités dans toutes les classes d’actifs. Les baisses de taux pourraient profiter aux instruments obligataires, notamment les bons du Trésor américain à court terme et les obligations Investment grade.
fixed_income_credit_quality_investment_g: positive
Investment-grade bonds are a primary beneficiary of rate cuts.

Les baisses de taux pourraient profiter aux instruments obligataires, notamment les bons du Trésor américain à court terme et les obligations Investment grade, dont la composante taux est plus élevée que par le passé.
fixed_income_credit_quality_high_yield_w: High yield is presented as an income-generating opportunity.
fixed_income_credit_quality_high_yield_r: Certains segments obligataires pourraient être intéressants, notamment les titres à haut rendement et le crédit titrisé, qui peuvent générer un revenu non-négligeable.
fixed_income_duration_why: The preferred sovereign duration exposure is on the short end.
fixed_income_duration_raw_wording: Les baisses de taux pourraient profiter aux bons du Trésor américain à court terme.
fixed_income_segment_government_bonds_wh: Short-term Treasuries are one of the named bond opportunities.
fixed_income_segment_government_bonds_ra: Les baisses de taux pourraient profiter aux bons du Trésor américain à court terme.
fixed_income_segment_corporate_bonds_why: Corporate credit is supported by resilient fundamentals.
fixed_income_segment_corporate_bonds_raw: Le crédit américain IG évolue en milieu de cycle, et non en fin de cycle. Le marché à haut rendement se porte également bien, avec une amélioration de la qualité de crédit et une duration plus courte.
fixed_income_segment_em_debt_why: EM debt is a direct beneficiary of easier Fed policy.
fixed_income_segment_em_debt_raw_wording: Les obligations en devises locales et la dette extérieure des pays émergents devraient également bénéficier de l’assouplissement de la Fed.
currencies_usd_why: Goldman does not have a clean one-way bearish dollar view.
currencies_usd_raw_wording: Sur le front des devises, le dollar américain a enregistré des performances mitigées sur fond de baisse des taux de la Fed. Historiquement, le dollar a tendance à se raffermir ou à évoluer en dents de scie lorsque la baisse des taux de la Fed n’entraîne pas de récession.
currencies_em_fx_why: Goldman expects EM local-currency debt to benefit from Fed easing without major currency weakening, which is supportive for EM FX.
currencies_em_fx_raw_wording: Les obligations en devises locales ... des pays emergents devraient egalement en beneficier ... sans affaiblir sensiblement leur devise.
themes_ai_why: AI remains fertile, but the firm stresses valuation and monetization discipline.
themes_ai_raw_wording: L’univers d’investissement lié à l’IA devrait s’élargir et donner accès à de nouvelles opportunités. Mais la visibilité sur la rentabilité de ces investissements reste faible, ce qui rend essentielle une analyse rigoureuse des fondamentaux.
themes_energy_transition_why: Power, infrastructure, and sustainable energy capex are explicit opportunity areas.
themes_energy_transition_raw_wording: La demande de données, alimentée par l’IA, va entraîner une accélération massive de la croissance de la demande mondiale en électricité. Les infrastructures, les obligations vertes et le financement de l’énergie durable offriront selon nous des opportunités prometteuses.
themes_geopolitical_risk_why: Geopolitics is treated as both a risk source and an investment catalyst.
themes_geopolitical_risk_raw_wording: Les tensions géopolitiques, les engagements de l’OTAN en matière de défense et la nouvelle dynamique des projets de réindustrialisation imposent aux nations et aux entreprises de construire des chaînes d’approvisionnement résilientes et de sécuriser leurs ressources critiques.
themes_defense_sovereignty_why: Economic security, defense, and national resilience are core themes.
themes_defense_sovereignty_raw_wording: Nous pensons que le thème de la sécurité économique va s’imposer en 2026. Les gérants actifs auront de nombreuses opportunités d’investir dans des entreprises idéalement positionnées pour profiter de cette transition.
themes_other_why: Supply-chain resilience and economic security are additional thematic calls.
themes_other_raw_wording: Le thème de la sécurité économique va occuper une place centrale, avec des besoins d’investissement gigantesques dans la résilience des chaînes d’approvisionnement, les ressources critiques et la cybersécurité.

equities_geography_us_raw_wording: we're keeping a smaller investment than in previous years
equities_geography_europe_why: Developed markets outside the US, especially Europe, look more attractive than US equities.
equities_geography_europe_raw_wording: Stocks in Europe and other developed markets look more attractive than US equities
equities_geography_japan_why: Invesco expects Japanese growth to improve in 2026 with policy support still in place.
equities_geography_japan_raw_wording: We expect economic growth in Japan will continue to improve in 2026
equities_geography_em_why: Emerging market equities offer stronger growth potential.
equities_geography_em_raw_wording: Emerging market stocks offer strong growth potential
equities_geography_china_why: Invesco expects Chinese stocks to keep outperforming.
equities_geography_china_raw_wording: We anticipate Chinese stocks to continue to outperform

fixed_income_overall_raw_wording: US bonds look attractive overall

Investment grade credit is marginally preferred to government bonds

fixed_income_segment_government_bonds_ra: US bonds look attractive overall

fixed_income_segment_corporate_bonds_raw: Investment grade credit is marginally preferred to government bonds
currencies_usd_why: Invesco expects the dollar to weaken in the base case.
currencies_usd_raw_wording: the USD to weaken
commodities_overall_why: Invesco is constructive on commodities overall through both industrial metals and precious metals.
commodities_gold_why: Gold demand should remain steady on central bank buying.
commodities_gold_raw_wording: central banks are likely to continue building gold stocks
commodities_industrial_metals_why: Industrial metals should benefit from better global growth and a weaker USD.
commodities_industrial_metals_raw_wordin: Industrial Metals Better global growth and a weaker USD
themes_ai_why: AI supports growth, but Invesco's base case still prefers rest-of-world equities over a renewed US tech surge.
themes_ai_raw_wording: AI investment has supported US GDP ... Could AI breakthroughs cause US stocks to rally?
themes_geopolitical_risk_why: Geopolitical and political instability are explicit downside scenarios.
themes_geopolitical_risk_raw_wording: political instability disrupt growth in Europe
themes_defense_sovereignty_why: European military and infrastructure spending is presented as a key support for regional recovery and investment opportunities.
themes_defense_sovereignty_raw_wording: Germany plans to increase spending on their military and infrastructure, and other countries are following suit.

global_growth_2026_why: JP Morgan expects global growth to broaden across regions in 2026 under supportive monetary and fiscal policy.
global_growth_2026_raw_wording: Scenario de base : la croissance mondiale se generalise.
us_gdp_2026_why: JP Morgan expects U.S. growth to continue on rate cuts, tax support, and ongoing AI investment.
us_gdp_2026_raw_wording: La croissance americaine se poursuit soutenue par un nouvel assouplissement de la Reserve federale et les investissements continus dans l IA.
eurozone_gdp_2026_why: JP Morgan expects European growth to accelerate on significant fiscal stimulus and prior ECB easing.
eurozone_gdp_2026_raw_wording: La croissance europeenne devrait s accelerer grace a une relance budgetaire considerable et au soutien continu des precedentes baisses de taux.
fed_year_end_rate_2026_why: JP Morgan sees the Fed moving rates back toward neutral
fed_year_end_rate_2026_raw_wording: La Reserve federale semble maintenant disposee a ramener son taux directeur a un niveau neutre qu elle estime etre autour de 3 %.
equities_overall_why: JPM starts from a broadly constructive global equity backdrop.
equities_overall_raw_wording: Les actions mondiales pourraient bien clôturer l’année sur une progression à deux chiffres.
equities_geography_us_why: The U.S. remains supported by fiscal liquidity, easing, and AI investment.
equities_geography_us_raw_wording: Selon nous, l’économie américaine devrait profiter des effets positifs des gains de pouvoir d’achat, des baisses de taux et des investissements continus dans l’intelligence artificielle.
equities_geography_europe_why: Europe is supported by German fiscal expansion and easier policy.
equities_geography_europe_raw_wording: L’activité devrait s’accélérer de manière significative en Europe continentale en 2026. L’énorme plan de relance budgétaire annoncé en Allemagne commencera à se répercuter dans les données économiques.
equities_geography_china_why: China improves at the margin through tech leadership and policy support.
equities_geography_china_raw_wording: La reprise des valeurs technologiques et les soutiens publics ont soutenu l’ensemble du marché chinois et devraient contribuer à améliorer la confiance des consommateurs.
fixed_income_credit_quality_investment_g: ND
fixed_income_duration_why: JPM explicitly reintroduces long high-quality bonds as protection.
fixed_income_duration_raw_wording: Pour se prémunir contre un décrochage des actions technologiques, les investisseurs devraient envisager des obligations de haute qualité à long terme.
fixed_income_segment_government_bonds_wh: High-quality sovereign-like duration regains a defensive role.
fixed_income_segment_government_bonds_ra: Les investisseurs devraient envisager des obligations de haute qualité à long terme pour se protéger contre un décrochage des actions technologiques.
currencies_usd_why: JPM explicitly flags downside dollar risk.
currencies_usd_raw_wording: Si l’indépendance de la banque centrale américaine devait réellement être remise en question, le dollar serait probablement l’actif qui en pâtirait le plus. Le dollar américain continue de chuter face à un large panier de devises.
commodities_gold_why: Gold is a recommended hedge against chronic inflation and credibility risk.
commodities_gold_raw_wording: Un autre actif à considérer est l’or. Dans les périodes d’inflation chronique, ses propriétés de réserve de valeur en font un important atout de diversification de portefeuille.
themes_ai_why: AI remains a growth engine, but JPM explicitly maps a downside bubble scenario.
themes_ai_raw_wording: Risque baissier: les actions technologiques faiblissent. L’engouement pour l’IA s’affaiblit si la demande en infrastructures a été surestimée, mais notre scénario central reste soutenu par des investissements continus dans l’IA.
themes_geopolitical_risk_why: Geopolitical tension remains one of the key downside scenarios.
themes_geopolitical_risk_raw_wording: Les tensions géopolitiques contribuent à la une des journaux et demeurent un risque potentiel de déraillement important pour les investisseurs.
themes_defense_sovereignty_why: European defense spending is framed as both macro support and structural investment theme.
themes_defense_sovereignty_raw_wording: Les autres pays européens ont décidé d’augmenter leur budget de défense. Les dépenses de défense peuvent améliorer la productivité si la recherche et développement débouche sur de l’innovation.
